title: Reference Anime Travel Postcard Transform AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Anime Travel Postcard Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image charming hand-drawn anime travel postcard for uploaded couple travel photo before anime postcard transformation, preserving cute couple standing together with arms raised, holding hands, joyful expressions, and soft smiles. Subject: cute couple standing together with arms raised, holding hands, joyful expressions, and soft smiles keep the original pose, composition, clothing, hand-holding gesture, camera angle, joyful expressions, and bright adventure mood while becoming cute anime-style travel characters. Scene: snow-capped mountain valley with lush green meadow, wildflowers, blue sky, and fluffy white clouds with majestic mountains, lush valley, wildflowers, blue sky, fluffy clouds, warm sunlight, and dreamy vacation atmosphere. Composition: Preserve the uploaded travel-photo composition exactly: full-body characters centered, arms raised, hand-holding gesture intact, mountain landscape stretching behind them, and balanced social-media poster design. Signature Elements: Whimsical doodles including hand-drawn sun, stars, hearts, clouds, airplane trail, sparkles, and playful travel sketches integrated around the scene. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired travel postcard, pastel colors, clean line art, soft painterly shading, storybook illustration, kawaii aesthetic, whimsical travel diary mood, and high-detail hand-drawn finish. Color Palette: Fixed pastel mountain-day palette with sky blue, grass green, warm sunlight, soft cloud whites, wildflower accents, and cozy storybook color harmony. Lighting: Warm cheerful summer daylight, soft painterly highlights, gentle atmospheric depth, and clear character readability. Typography: Wooden signboard text GOOD VIBES and handwritten note Adventure Time appear as readable hand-drawn travel lettering. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
